name: io.github.alsoleg89/ai-knot
title: ai-knot
description: Deterministic, self-hosted persistent memory MCP server for AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: AI_KNOT_AGENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Agent namespace to read and write memory under.

environmentVariables.name: AI_KNOT_STORAGE
environmentVariables.description: Storage backend: sqlite, yaml, or postgres.

environmentVariables.name: AI_KNOT_DATA_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Base directory for yaml or sqlite storage.

environmentVariables.name: AI_KNOT_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Optional LLM provider for learn() extraction, for example openai or anthropic.

environmentVariables.name: AI_KNOT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional API key for the configured learn() provider.

environmentVariables.name: AI_KNOT_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Optional model override for learn() extraction.
